violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The coolers up front had products temping between 49 and 63 degrees on the top for the right unit and 48 to 56 for the left unit. The air temp in the right unit was 46 degrees and 51 degrees for the left unit. Both units are not maintaining temperature below 41 degrees.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The soup cooker is not under a hood system.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice chute on the soda dispenser up front needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The ceiling above the oven and soup cooker needs to be cleaned. The wall behind the oven needs to be cleaned.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The small fryer on the counter had oil in it. No hood system is provided.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The ceiling and wall above the ovens needs to be cleaned.
